caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses stands before a brown slatted wall, performing with an acoustic guitar. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest adorned with white floral embroidery and red accents. He is positioned behind a microphone on a stand, focusing downward on his instrument. In the foreground, the backs of several audience members' heads are visible, including people with blonde and brown hair. The text "ORCA" is displayed as a white logo on a black rectangular background in the lower right area of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to play the guitar, his hands shifting slightly on the fretboard and body of the instrument, while the audience remains stationary. The lighting and setting remain constant throughout the sequence.
